channel.title: David Mausolf
channel.description: Essays on work, AI, and who actually produces the outcomes.

item.title: Who’s Actually Doing the Work?
item.description: Data-driven essay examining how organizations systematically overvalue visible work and undervalue the people who produce outcomes. Covers the introvert earnings gap, neurodivergent employment barriers, AI-driven compression of middle management, and the coming repricing of knowledge work.
item.dc:creator: David Mausolf
